zh.lifeSummary: 當Hodienne De LUCERNE於1150年出生在英國瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓時，她的父親Gifford de Lucerne26歲，母親Lady Gifford De Lucerne22歲。她於1169年與Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton在英國瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1215年1月5日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hodienne De LUCERNE于1150年出生在英国瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓时，她的父亲Gifford de Lucerne26岁，母亲Lady Gifford De Lucerne22岁。她于1169年与Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton在英国瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1215年1月5日在苏格兰艾斯爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Hodienne De LUCERNE was born in 1150, in Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England, her father, Gifford de Lucerne, was 26 and her mother, Lady Gifford De Lucerne, was 22. She married Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton in 1169, in Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 5 January 1215, in Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hodienne De LUCERNE est née en 1150, à Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Gifford de Lucerne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Gifford De Lucerne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton en 1169, à Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 janvier 1215, à Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hodienne De LUCERNE 1150 in Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gifford de Lucerne 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Gifford De Lucerne 22. Sie hat 1169 in Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. Januar 1215 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hodienne De LUCERNE è nata il nel 1150 nel Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Gifford de Lucerne, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Gifford De Lucerne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton nel 1169, nel Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 gennaio 1215, nel Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hodienne De LUCERNEが1150年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルムレイトンで生まれた時，父Gifford de Lucerneは26歳，母Lady Gifford De Lucerneは22歳であった。1169年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルムレイトンでSir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1215年1月5日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hodienne De LUCERNE(이)가 1150년 영국 워윅실르 워레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gifford de Lucerne(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Gifford De Lucerne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1169년 영국 워윅실르 워레이턴에서 Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1215년 1월 5일 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hodienne De LUCERNE nasceu em 1150, em Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gifford de Lucerne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Gifford De Lucerne, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton em 1169, em Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1215, em Ayrshire, Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hodienne De LUCERNE родилась в 1150 г. в местности вормлиитон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gifford de Lucerne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Gifford De Lucerne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton в 1169 г. в местности вормлиитон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 января 1215 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hodienne De LUCERNE nació en 1150, en Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gifford de Lucerne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Gifford De Lucerne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Richard de Wallace Laird Of Riccarton en 1169, en Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de enero de 1215, en Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
